feature_title: Kima Hub Upstream — Deferred: Database Indexes (KH-21)

companion_files.name: PLAN.md
companion_files.content:
# Kima Hub Upstream — Deferred: Database Indexes (KH-21)

## Document Status
- Last updated: 2026-03-02
- Feature: Database performance indexes
- Scope: Deferred — already implemented
- Implementation state: Deferred

## Origin

Upstream: `chevron7locked/kima-hub` v1.5.0 → v1.6.0, item KH-21.

## What the Upstream Change Does

Added database indexes on `Album.title`, `Artist.enrichmentStatus`, `Track.analysisStatus`, and compound indexes for enrichment query performance.

## Deferral Reasoning

Soundspan's Prisma schema already has comprehensive index coverage:
- `Track.analysisStatus` — indexed
- `Track.analysisMode` — indexed
- `Track.vibeAnalysisStatus` — indexed
- Individual mood fields — indexed
- Various compound indexes for enrichment queries

Coverage is equal or better than Kima Hub's additions.

## Possible Minor Gap

`Album.title` index may not exist in soundspan. If missing, this is a trivial single-column `CREATE INDEX` migration that can be done standalone without a full workstream.

## Revisit Criteria

- Query performance profiling reveals missing Album.title index as a bottleneck
- New enrichment query patterns require compound indexes not already present
